description_long: This object is a realistic carrot with a vibrant orange, elongated root and a cluster of green leafy tops. The carrot root is smooth and tapers to a pointed tip, with a subtle gradient from a deeper orange at the base to a lighter hue near the tip. The leafy greens are arranged in a rosette pattern, with multiple jagged-edged leaves radiating outward from the top of the root. The surface of the carrot appears matte and slightly textured, typical of fresh produce. There are no visible signs of dirt or soil on the root, and the carrot is free from any branching or splitting. The overall appearance suggests a fresh, healthy carrot suitable for urban markets or street vendors.
description: A fresh, orange carrot with a pointed tip and a rosette of green leafy tops, featuring a smooth, matte surface and no visible dirt.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the orange carrot root and the leafy green tops extending outward.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the rosette arrangement of the green leaves and the circular cross-section of the carrot root.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the carrot's smooth, tapered body and leafy greens from a different angle.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the pointed tip of the carrot and the underside of the leafy cluster.
